output.code:
# Read the text file
path = "/mnt/data/file-4dQgmZ6Js3FkoYydhhnz9g-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    text = f.read()
len(text)

text = text  # already loaded

ayah_full = 'وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخْرَجًا * وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ'
hadith_full = 'إن الله تعالى يقول: يا ابن آدم، تفرغ لعبادتي أملأ صدرك غنى وأسد فقرك، وإن لا تفعل ملأت يديك شغلاً ولم أسد فقرك'
frag = 'وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخ'

# find all occurrences of full ayah
indices_ayah = []
start = 0
while True:
    idx = text.find(ayah_full, start)
    if idx == -1:
        break
    indices_ayah.append((idx, idx + len(ayah_full)))
    start = idx + 1

# find all occurrences of hadith
indices_hadith = []
start = 0
while True:
    idx = text.find(hadith_full, start)
    if idx == -1:
        break
    indices_hadith.append((idx, idx + len(hadith_full)))
    start = idx + 1

len(indices_ayah), len(indices_hadith), indices_ayah[:5], indices_hadith[:5]

# find all occurrences of fragment
indices_frag = []
start = 0
while True:
    idx = text.find(frag, start)
    if idx == -1:
        break
    indices_frag.append(idx)
    start = idx + 1
indices_frag, len(indices_frag)

context_start = max(0, last_start-50)
print(text[context_start:last_start])
print(repr(text[last_start-1]), repr(text[last_start-2]), repr(text[last_start-3]))

def check_surroundings(indices, label):
    res = []
    for (s, e) in indices:
        before = text[s-1] if s-1 >= 0 else ''
        after = text[e] if e < len(text) else ''
        res.append((s, e, before, after, text[s:e]))
    print(label, len(res))
    for entry in res:
        print(entry[0], entry[1], repr(entry[2]), repr(entry[3]))
    return res

ayah_entries = check_surroundings(indices_ayah, "ayah_full")
hadith_entries = check_surroundings(indices_hadith, "hadith_full")

# For the partial
s = last_start
e = len(text)
print("partial", s, e, repr(text[s-1]), "(no after)")

# Collect spans
spans = []
for (s,e) in indices_ayah:
    spans.append((s,e,'Aya'))
for (s,e) in indices_hadith:
    spans.append((s,e,'Hadeeth'))
# add partial ayah
spans.append((last_start, len(text), 'Aya'))

# sort by start
spans.sort(key=lambda x: x[0])
spans, len(spans)

result = []
for s,e,t in spans:
    result.append({"span_start": s, "span_end": e, "span_text": text[s:e], "citation_type": "Aya" if t=="Aya" else "Hadeeth"})
result
